title: Hiyori and Yasuie Reveal Wano’s Pain
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Queen, Unknown person #8, Zoro, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10 as Hiyori’s identity and Yasuie’s sacrifice pull the Wano rebellion into a deeper emotional crisis.
scene: Zoro protects Toko and meets Hiyori, while Yasuie prepares a sacrifice meant to rescue the rebellion’s plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Iyooh.!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Excuse Meeff!! Heloooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I OVER- HEARD YOU OUTSIDE!! YOYOH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second, who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: YOUR VOICES ARE SO POWERFUL!! »

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa!! Are you a beautiful goddess, or what?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: oh my.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you... perhaps... Shinobu!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And you're... Kanjuro!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know, there've been rumours swirl- ing around the capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: They're making me all excited!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So, is it finally time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For the final battle...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a few more pictures of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: My swords!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: K'1AA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That scared me!! Aha hahah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please... lie back down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You'll open your wound again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank you very much...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For saving us earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Thank youUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that you let yourself get injured so badly just for our sake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: honest- Ly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How will we ever repay you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My injury was due to my naivety.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's got nothing to do with you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, do you know where that big guy went? He still has my sword....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must not move!! Please stay still!! You can't go outside with a wound like that...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOW

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you pull my other arm, you idiot!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: kyaaah!! I am so very sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah.. But, you'll be healed in no time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Because back in the capital, I sto-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No.. bought some TOAD OIL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So you stole it, then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you rub it on your wound, it'll heal instantly!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Even sharp sword wounds will disappear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gylkimaru?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is famous in the capital. The citizens call him GYUKIMARU of OIHAGI BRIDGE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Nobody knows where he lives, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is a warrior monk that ambushes those with weapons when they cross the bridge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I see. Then there's no need to hurry after him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, who the hell are you two? You were targeted by that GRM REAPER guy, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right, to be honest... we angered the shogun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And can no longer enter the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Shogun, huh...? What was his name again? ORO... Oroshi*?

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It's Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name's TOKO! If you put an O in front of my name, it's O-TOO.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: im not a boy, though. Ehehehehe!! That's funny, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Not really.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Hiyori and Yasuie storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Hiyori and Yasuie bring the rebellion’s emotional history into the foreground.
